# 12-Factor Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/moduledecomposition -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Module Decomposition SSOT](../module-decomposition.md)

Configuration is injected through RIIDO_* env vars or explicit local CLI flags.

Test-only gates use `AGENTBRIDGE_*`.

Local daemon state is disposable; durable facts live in task DB JSON, sidecar lease/registry files, mwsd projection files, workdir metadata, or SaaS assignment events.

cmd/riido opens local IPC only and must not add a public HTTP listener.
